plan_metadata.name: Sample Incoming Webhook Notification Happy Path

steps.description: Click on the "Search" input box within the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code to activate the search field for filtering sample projects.
Type 'incoming' into the sample search bar within the 'Samples' tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.

Click the blue "Create" button next to the "Incoming Webhook Notification" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit panel within Visual Studio Code.
And input ${{var:app_name:incoming-webhook-notification}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the "Workspace Folder" selection dialog within Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@code replace line 8 with const webhookUrl: string = "https://test.com" in file "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}}/src/index.ts"
Click the "Run and Debug" icon in the Visual Studio Code Activity Bar on the left to open the Run and Debug panel.
Click the "Attach..." dropdown in the Run and Debug panel at the top left of the Visual Studio Code interface.
@assertion there's message: "failed to send adaptive card. " exist.
